sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Herc Holdings Inc. to Participate in Bank of America’s 2026 Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference
feed.summary: Herc Holdings Inc., a leading equipment rental supplier, announced that its CEO, Larry Silber, and CFO, Mark Humphrey, will participate in Bank of America’s 2026 Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference on May 12, 2026. They are scheduled for a fireside chat discussion and audio webcast at 11:50 a.m. ET. The company, founded in 1965, operates 609 locations across North America and reported approximately $4.4 billion in total revenues in 2025.

feed.title: Bank of America Increases Atmos Energy (ATO) Target, Maintains Neutral Stance
feed.summary: Bank of America analyst Ross Fowler increased the price target for Atmos Energy (ATO) to $206 from $177, while keeping a Neutral rating. The firm anticipates Q2 EPS of $3.39 for Atmos, aligning with consensus. Additionally, Truist Financial initiated coverage on Atmos Energy with a Hold rating and a $195 price target, highlighting American Electric Power, Entergy Corporation, and Xcel Energy as top picks in the utility sector.

feed.title: Apple AAPL Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Apple announced a significant executive transition with Timothy D. Cook moving to executive chairman and John Ternus becoming CEO. The company reported robust Q2 2026 results, including $111.2 billion in revenue, up 17%, and record performances in iPhone, Services, and geographical segments, despite supply constraints. Apple also updated its capital allocation strategy, ending its net cash neutrality target, authorizing a new $100 billion share buyback, and increasing its dividend, while emphasizing continued investments in both product roadmap and AI development.

feed.title: Two Giant Apartment REITs Eye $50 Billion Merger Amid Rent Stagnation
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities and Equity Residential, the two largest apartment REITs in the US, are reportedly discussing a potential $50 billion merger. This comes as both companies face challenges with weak rent growth and increased operating costs. The merger would create a dominant force in the rental housing sector but would likely face significant antitrust scrutiny.

feed.title: Sara Kelly, Starbucks evp, sells $210,000 in shares
feed.summary: Starbucks EVP Sara Kelly sold 2,000 shares of common stock worth $210,000 on April 29, 2026, at $105.00 per share. This sale occurred while Starbucks stock was trading near its 52-week high, although InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued. The transaction was conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in December 2025.

feed.title: Regency Centers (REG) Heads Into Q1 2026 With US$856m FFO Reinforcing Bullish Narratives
feed.summary: Regency Centers (REG) reported strong Q4 2025 results with US$418.3 million revenue and US$1.09 basic EPS, driving a positive outlook for Q1 2026. The company's net profit margins improved significantly, contributing to US$855.7 million in Funds From Operations. While revenue growth was modest, the focus is on the durability of its high margins and FFO, although critics point to a premium P/E, a one-off gain, and debt coverage concerns.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) Price Target Raised to $54.50 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) to $54.50, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 7.37% from its last closing price. Several other analysts have also raised their price targets recently, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $57.19.

feed.title: Valero reports improved Q1 earnings for ethanol, DGD joint venture
feed.summary: Valero announced improved first-quarter earnings for its ethanol segment and its Diamond Green Diesel (DGD) joint venture. This positive performance reflects growth in these key areas for the company.

feed.title: What's the Upside for Netflix Stock Investors?
feed.summary: The article discusses the investment upside for Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) shareholders, noting that while Netflix offers long-term opportunities, it was not among The Motley Fool Stock Advisor's top 10 stock picks. The Motley Fool highlights the significant returns achieved by past recommendations like Netflix and Nvidia, emphasizing the potential for market-crushing outperformance through their Stock Advisor service. It ultimately suggests that investors should research before buying Netflix stock.

feed.title: Ohio Supreme Court sides with AEP, denying $75 million in refunds for scandal-ridden coal plants costs
feed.summary: The Ohio Supreme Court ruled in favor of American Electric Power (AEP), denying customers nearly $75 million in refunds. The utility had been accused of overcharging to support two unprofitable, scandal-ridden coal plants. Despite arguments from the Ohio Consumers' Counsel regarding softened audit language, the court affirmed that the Public Utilities Commission of Ohio's decision to allow AEP to collect subsidies for the OVEC plants in 2018 and 2019 was prudent at the time.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has raised its price target for Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) to $68.50, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 5.19% upside. This comes after Citizens Financial Group beat quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $1.13 and a 12% year-over-year revenue increase to $2.17 billion. The bank currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts with a target price of $70.88.

feed.title: Hexcel Issues New Senior Notes to Refinance 2027 Debt
feed.summary: Hexcel (HXL) has issued $400 million of new 4.900% senior notes due 2031 to refinance its existing $400 million 3.950% senior notes due in 2027. This strategic move aims to extend the company's debt maturity profile and maintain a defined interest cost. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates HXL as "Neutral" due to sound financial performance and positive earnings call commentary, but notes concerns about expensive valuation and higher leverage.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for The PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) stock to $238.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 6.61% upside. Other analysts also increased their price targets, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus. PNC recently surpassed Q1 EPS estimates but slightly missed revenue expectations, demonstrating strong profitability.

feed.title: Equinix (EQIX) Premium P/E Tested As Earnings Growth Lags Broader Market Narratives
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) reported Q1 2026 revenue of US$2.4 billion and EPS of US$4.22, with trailing twelve-month revenue at US$9.5 billion and EPS at US$14.50. Despite a premium P/E of 75.1x and strong historical earnings growth, its forecasted earnings and revenue growth are slower than the broader US market, raising questions about its high valuation given debt coverage concerns and insider selling. The article highlights both bullish arguments focusing on recurring cash flows and quality earnings, and cautious views emphasizing slower growth forecasts and balance sheet pressure.

feed.title: labcorp holdings inc. Positive Earnings Pre-Announcements
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc. has released positive earnings pre-announcements, with its estimated revenue range for FY26 increasing from $14.61 - $14.79 billion to $14.65 - $14.80 billion. The company's EPS estimates also saw a positive adjustment. This update highlights a strong financial outlook for Labcorp.

feed.title: Harbor Human Capital Factor US Small Cap ETF (HAPS) Chart and Price History 2026 $HAPS
feed.summary: This article provides the chart and price history for the Harbor Human Capital Factor US Small Cap ETF (HAPS) as of late April 2026. It details the fund's price performance over various timeframes, including a 32.67% increase over the last 12 months and a year-to-date return of 9.72%. The HAPS ETF last traded at $34.05 with a market capitalization of $155.61 million.

feed.title: Stryker results miss after Q1 cyberattack, company sticks with guidance
feed.summary: Stryker reported first-quarter results that missed Wall Street analyst consensus due to a significant cyberattack by Iran-backed hackers in early March. Despite the operational disruption, the company is maintaining its full-year 2026 guidance, citing strong market fundamentals. Stryker also announced organizational changes, combining orthopedic instruments and Mako surgical robotics into a new Ortho Tech business, and its intention to acquire Amplitude Vascular Systems.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Ruth Dowling Sells Shares of American Tower Corp (AMT)
feed.summary: Ruth Dowling, Executive Vice President, Chief Administrative Officer, General Counsel & Secretary at American Tower Corp (AMT), sold 972 shares of the company on April 29, 2026. Following this transaction, she now owns 29,461 shares. American Tower Corp is modestly undervalued according to its GuruFocus Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.86.

feed.title: A2QLHY Stock Price and Chart — LS:A2QLHY
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Centerspace (A2QLHY) stock, traded on the LS exchange. It details key financial statistics, upcoming earnings reports, analyst ratings, and information on ETFs holding the stock. The article also addresses frequently asked questions about the company's stock performance, volatility, and dividend payments.

feed.title: One and one Green Techs FY 2025 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: One and One Green Technologies Inc. reported record revenue of $65.8 million for fiscal year 2025, with net income nearly doubling to $11.8 million and gross margin expanding by over 400 basis points. The company, which recently completed its IPO on NASDAQ, plans geographic expansion into Southeast Asia, Japan, South Korea, Europe, and the Americas, and will launch a dedicated lithium battery recycling facility within three years. These strategic initiatives are supported by their government-issued hazardous waste import license and proprietary emissions technology.

feed.title: MetLife, Inc. Non Cum Red Perp Pfd Registered Shs Series D Dividends – FINRA:MET4612264
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for MetLife, Inc. Non Cum Red Perp Pfd Registered Shs Series D (FINRA:MET4612264), specifically focusing on its dividend insights. It highlights that the market is closed for this security and directs users to various financial data sections such as statements, statistics, dividends, and earnings.

feed.title: Planned 2,000-share sale by Starbucks (SBUX) EVP Sara Kelly disclosed
feed.summary: Starbucks EVP and Chief Partner Officer Sara Kelly sold 2,000 shares of Starbucks common stock at $105.00 per share on April 29, 2026. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 3, 2025. After the sale, Kelly directly holds 57,652.8408 shares of Starbucks stock, which includes 44.286 shares acquired via an employee stock purchase plan.

feed.title: DexCom (DXCM) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: DexCom (DXCM) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with worldwide revenue reaching $1.19 billion, reflecting 15% reported growth and 12% organic growth, driven by broad CGM demand and new product launches, including the G7 15-day system. The company reaffirmed its 2026 revenue guidance while increasing its non-GAAP operating profit and adjusted EBITDA margin outlooks, crediting operational efficiencies and strong market reception. DexCom also announced significant commercial coverage expansion for the type 2 non-insulin diabetes segment and anticipates the readout of a key randomized control trial at the ADA's 2026 Scientific Sessions, reinforcing its commitment to expanding access and product innovation.

feed.title: Hecla Mining Co (HL) Shares Surge 3.1% -- What GF Score of 71 Te
feed.summary: Hecla Mining Co (HL) shares surged 3.1% to $18.02 on April 30, 2026. Despite the surge, the stock is considered significantly overvalued with a GF Value™ of $8.94 and a GF Score™ of 71/100, indicating an "Above Average" rating driven by strong financial health but weak valuation. Investors face potential risks due to the premium pricing, as there have been no insider transactions in the last three months to suggest changes in insider sentiment.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: First Internet Bancorp Q1 2026 EPS beats forecasts
feed.summary: First Internet Bancorp (INBK) reported Q1 2026 EPS of $0.29, significantly beating the forecast of $0.09, despite revenue falling short at $43.1 million against a $45.67 million forecast. The company's stock rose 1.51% after the announcement, driven by strong net interest income growth, strategic investments in AI, and promising outlook for net interest margin expansion and profitability in the latter half of the year. Management discussed efforts to improve credit quality, particularly in SBA and franchise finance portfolios, and ongoing momentum in Banking-as-a-Service operations.

feed.title: Veeva Systems Set to Join S&P 500
feed.summary: Veeva Systems (VEEV) is set to join the S&P 500 index. This announcement comes from Quantisnow, a platform providing real-time market data and news for investors. The article also lists recent analyst ratings for VEEV, CTRA, DVN, and SPGI.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Ingram Micro Q1 2026 highlights strong growth
feed.summary: Ingram Micro (INGM) reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with a 13.7% year-over-year revenue increase to $13.96 billion, despite a slight EPS miss. The company's strategic focus on GPU and AI infrastructure projects, alongside the Xvantage platform, drove growth across all regions and improved operational efficiency. Ingram Micro provided an optimistic Q2 2026 outlook, expecting continued revenue growth and strong EPS, leveraging its global reach and AI-driven innovations.

feed.title: IBM Launches ‘Bob’ to Tackle Enterprise AI Development Challenges
feed.summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE: IBM) has launched IBM Bob, an AI-powered development tool aimed at streamlining the entire software lifecycle. This tool addresses challenges such as complexity, legacy systems, and compliance risks that enterprises face in AI development. IBM reports significant internal productivity gains, with over 80,000 employees already using Bob, and some tasks completed in a fraction of the time.

feed.title: DexCom Q1 2026 slides: margin expansion accelerates, guidance raised
feed.summary: DexCom (NASDAQ:DXCM) exceeded Q1 2026 expectations with $1.19 billion in revenue, driven by continuous glucose monitoring product demand and strategic initiatives like the G7 15 Day system. The company demonstrated significant margin expansion, with adjusted EBITDA margin reaching 30.6%, and subsequently raised its full-year 2026 profitability guidance while maintaining its revenue outlook. Despite strong performance, the stock trades near its 52-week low, indicating investor caution regarding sustained margin expansion and potential deceleration in revenue growth amidst competitive and geopolitical challenges.

feed.title: Resmed Q3 earnings exceed estimates, announce CFO’s retirement
feed.summary: Resmed reported Q3 revenues of $1.43 billion, surpassing Wall Street estimates, driven by increased demand for its sleep devices. The company also announced the retirement of its CFO, Brett Sandercock, and plans to acquire Notrix Health, a startup specializing in treating Restless Legs Syndrome. CEO Mick Farrell suggested that GLP-1 drugs could further boost demand for Resmed's products by encouraging more people to seek medical attention for sleep-related issues.

feed.title: Booking Holdings (BKNG) Q1 Margin Stability Tests Bullish Profitability Narratives
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) reported its Q1 2026 results with US$5.5 billion in revenue and US$1.37 basic EPS, maintaining profitability with margins around 22%. Despite stable margins, revenue growth of 7.9% trails the broader US market benchmark, raising questions about the company's "AI and Connected Trip" vision. Analysts note a high level of debt as a risk, despite the stock trading below its discounted cash flow fair value.

feed.title: S&P 500 swap on May 7 puts Veeva in and removes Coterra
feed.summary: Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) will be added to the S&P 500 index, replacing Coterra Energy (NYSE: CTRA), effective before the opening of trading on May 7, 2026. This change is due to Devon Energy’s (NYSE: DVN) acquisition of Coterra, which is expected to close soon. The acquisition involves an exchange ratio of 0.70 Devon common shares for each Coterra share, subject to final closing conditions.

feed.title: Costco Makes Minor Change To $1.50 Hot Dog Combo With New Drink Option
feed.summary: Costco (COST) has made a slight modification to its iconic $1.50 hot dog and soda combo by offering bottled water as an alternative to soda at no extra cost. This change aims to appeal to health-conscious customers and aligns with Costco's ongoing efforts to reduce plastic waste, despite some customer concerns about the flimsiness of its Kirkland Signature bottled water packaging. The price of the combo remains unchanged, upholding Costco's reputation for value.

feed.title: Warrior Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Warrior Met Coal, Inc. announced strong first-quarter 2026 results, driven by its new Blue Creek mine. The company achieved record sales volumes and a significant increase in net income and Adjusted EBITDA, completing the Blue Creek mine development ahead of schedule and within budget. Warrior reaffirmed its positive full-year 2026 guidance, emphasizing its strong position in the global steelmaking coal market despite ongoing challenges.

feed.title: GARTNER CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT) alleging that the company made false and misleading statements to investors between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Investors who purchased Gartner common stock during this period are encouraged to contact the firm before May 18, 2026, to discuss their rights and apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit claims Gartner failed to disclose its inability to meet consulting revenue targets or maintain its CV growth rate.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) to $160, maintaining a "neutral" rating, despite potential downside from the stock's current price. This follows Qualcomm beating Q2 EPS estimates, though its Q3 guidance fell below Street expectations due to handset and memory headwinds. The company's board also authorized a $20 billion share buyback amidst mixed analyst views and a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Alliant Energy: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corp. (LNT) reported first-quarter earnings of $224 million, or 87 cents per share, which adjusted to 82 cents per share for non-recurring gains. This result matched Wall Street expectations, with analysts also forecasting 82 cents per share. The company posted revenue of $1.18 billion and projects full-year earnings between $3.36 and $3.46 per share.

feed.title: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) Price Target Raised to $1,200.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) to $1,200 from $1,100, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment suggests a potential upside of 10.82% from the current stock price. Despite a Q1 earnings beat, the company's revenue and AFFO/FFO missed estimates, leading to short-term selling pressure, though management also raised FY2026 EPS guidance.

feed.title: Earnings Call Summary | O'Reilly Automotive(ORLY.US) Q1 2026 Earnings Conference
feed.summary: This document is an earnings call summary for O'Reilly Automotive's Q1 2026 earnings conference. It outlines key financial results and strategic highlights discussed during the call.

feed.title: Chipotle’s new brand chief gave fast-food burgers buzz. Now he’s coming for fast-casual burritos
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has appointed Fernando Machado as its new chief brand officer to revitalize its declining traffic and flat sales. Machado is renowned for his innovative and, at times, provocative marketing campaigns during his tenure at Burger King. His hiring is seen as a risk, as his stunt-driven approach will need to align with Chipotle's more earnest brand image to succeed.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Positive Forecast for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) from $183 to $197, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the new target suggesting a 7.26% downside from the previous close. This adjustment follows ODFL's Q1 earnings beat, where it exceeded EPS and revenue estimates, although the company reported a decrease in Less-Than-Truckload (LTL) tons and shipments per day year-over-year, alongside a worsened operating ratio. While several other analysts have also increased their price targets for ODFL, the consensus rating remains a "Hold" with an average target of $203.21, creating mixed signals for investors as the stock trades around $212.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust (CPT) Renews "At the Market" Sales Program with $500 Million Offering
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) has renewed its "at the market" sales program, allowing it to offer and sell up to $500 million in common shares through various financial institutions. This strategic move aims to enhance the real estate investment trust's financial flexibility and balance sheet by using the proceeds for general corporate purposes, including debt reduction. The company emphasizes a proactive approach to managing its capital structure in a dynamic market.

feed.title: Newmont Corp (NEM) Shares Surge 3.2% -- What GF Score of 79 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Newmont Corp (NEM) shares surged 3.2% to $111.09, despite being significantly overvalued by 57.8% according to its GF Value™ of $70.40. The company holds an above-average GF Score™ of 79/100 due to strong financial strength, profitability, and growth, but faces low valuation and momentum scores. Insider selling of $5.5 million with no buying activity also raises concerns about future performance.

feed.title: GROCERY OUTLET INVESTOR ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. (NASDAQ:GO) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between August 5, 2025, and March 4, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Grocery Outlet made misleading statements regarding its rapid store expansion and inability to meet financial guidance, leading to investor losses. Investors have until May 15, 2026, to apply to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: UDR Reports Steady Q1 2026 Performance, Introduces Monthly Divid
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. reported solid Q1 2026 results aligning with expectations, highlighting strong operational execution and capital allocation through asset sales, with proceeds for share repurchases and new acquisitions. The company also announced a transition to a monthly dividend, a first for residential REITs. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 82/100 and high profitability, financial strength is rated 3/10 due to potential concerns about debt levels, which investors should consider.

feed.title: Is American International Group (AIG) 19.7% Undervalued After Q1 2026?
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) released its Q1 2026 results, showing higher profitability on an adjusted basis and strong underwriting performance. While GAAP diluted EPS of $1.41 missed estimates, adjusted EPS of $2.11 beat expectations. The article highlights AIG's improved combined ratio, double-digit premium growth, and increased dividend, suggesting the stock is 19.7% undervalued according to GuruFocus data.

feed.title: Is Home Federal Bancorp of Louisiana (HFBL) Overvalued After Q3 Earnings?
feed.summary: Home Federal Bancorp Inc of Louisiana (HFBL) released its Q3 2026 earnings, reporting increased net income and improved EPS year-over-year. Despite enhanced profitability metrics and balance sheet growth, GuruFocus considers HFBL overvalued by 24.4% compared to its GF Value of $15.07, rating its GF Score at 73/100, Financial Strength at 5/10, Profitability at 6/10, and Growth at 3/10.

feed.title: Eaton Corp PLC (ETN) Shares Surge 5.4% -- What GF Score of 92 Te
feed.summary: Eaton Corp PLC (ETN) shares recently surged by 5.4% to $433.01, nearing its 52-week high, and exhibiting a strong GF Score of 92 out of 100. Despite this rally and strong fundamentals (Growth 9/10, Profitability 8/10), the stock is considered 19.2% overvalued according to GuruFocus' GF Value, trading significantly above its intrinsic value estimate. Insider selling of $5.5 million in the last three months suggests potential caution regarding the stock's current valuation, indicating possible risks for investors if market sentiment or earnings growth falters.

feed.title: Parker Hannifin Corp (PH) Stock Down 4.0% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 91/100
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corp (PH) shares fell 4.0% today but are still considered significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™, which indicates a nearly 50% downside potential. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 91/100, driven by high profitability and growth, the stock's valuation rank is low, and insiders have been selling shares, suggesting caution for investors. Its current P/E ratio is also notably above its historical median, reinforcing concerns about its high valuation.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings (LH) Margin Improvement Challenges Bearish Profitability Narrative Heading Into Q1 2026
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings (LH) has reported improved margins and 17.5% earnings growth over the last 12 months, challenging a bearish profitability narrative despite facing potential pressures from personnel costs and industry risks. While revenue growth of 4.6% trails the broader US market, efficiency measures and future collaborations are expected to drive volume. The company's valuation gap compared to DCF fair value and analyst targets reflects differing views on its ability to manage debt and pricing risks amidst slower projected revenue growth.
